results.title: ARKON 1/4"-20 Camera Mounting Thread to 3-Prong GoPro HERO Mount Adapter
results.snippet: The mount features a 3-prong action camera mount with a thumbscrew on top and a 1/4"-20 female thread on the bottom. It is designed to adapt your 2-prong camera mount onto a tripod or rig with a 1/4"-20 screw mount.

results.title: Amazon.com: Gopro Mount Adapter
results.snippet: Explore versatile GoPro mount adapters compatible with tripods, monopods, and selfie sticks. Find quality options for secure mounting.

results.title: Tripod Adapters | GoPro
results.snippet: These adapters let you attach your GoPro to any tripod, monopod or camera accessory with a standard 1/4-20 mount. results.title: Camera Mounting Bolt to GoPro HERO Mount Connection Adapter
results.snippet: This versatile adapter transforms your standard camera mount or tripod into a GoPro-compatible accessory. results.title: GoPro Mount 1/4-20 Screw Adapter, Tripod and Cold Shoe Mount
results.snippet: The 3-finger cold shoe mount adapter helps attach your camera to DSLR camera or any device with a cold shoe slot. The standard 1/4'' screw hole at the bottom of the adapter fits for any device with standard 1/4-20 stud.

results.title: 1/4"-20 Aluminum Camera Adapter with 20mm Ball + Action Camera GoPro Mount
results.snippet: 1x GoPro-compatible Action Camera Mount This adapter features the popular 1/4"-20 thread found on most tripods and fits into the bottom of most cameras in addition to being compatible with select RubiGrid® dash mounts.

results.title: GoPro to 1/4"-20 Camera Mount Adapter - makerworld.com
results.snippet: This is a custom-designed adapter that allows you to mount a GoPro on a standard camera mount with a 1/4"-20 thread. The design is optimized for strength and durability, ensuring a secure fit for action cameras in various mounting scenarios.

results.title: iBOLT™ ¼ 20" Camera Screw to GoPro Adapter
results.snippet: This iBOLT™ GoPro adapter converts standard camera mounts or tripods for mounting GoPro HERO action cameras. Turn your standard camera mount, tripod, and other camera accessories with a 1/4"-20 mounting bolt to an industry-standard GoPro Action accessory or mount.

results.title: NEEWER GP-7 Action Camera Mount Adapter with 1/4" Screw
results.snippet: Featuring two prong adapters, this mount suits a wide range of action camera accessories, including chest mounts, neck mounts, wrist mounts, helmet mounts, backpack clips, floating grips, and more.
